title: Merling's Grace
description: A small hex + origins mod allowing merlings to cast a spell to apply dolphin's grace.
body:
A very small [hex casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting) + [origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) addon mod allowing players with the Merling Origin to cast a spell called *Merling's Grace* to give an entity the [Dolphin's Grace](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Dolphin%27s_Grace) effect. It costs 1 amethyst dust per 3 seconds of effect.

Requested by Katte.
